summary: Lightweight JSONL event logger: session-scoped, writes to sessions/<id>.jsonl
detail: logger.py provides Session dataclass + module-level log()/start_session() helpers. Each event: {t, session, kind, data}. t is seconds since session start. Kinds used: session_start, user_message, model_request, model_response, tool_call, tool_result, turn_end, repl_end.
